name: Declarative Problem Solving in UAM Strategic Deconfliction

description: arXiv:2607.21197v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The growing demand for Urban Air Mobility (UAM) introduces significant challenges in airspace management, particularly within densely populated metropolitan regions. As the number of aerial vehicles-such as drones, air taxis, and helicopters-continues to rise, so does the risk of mid-air collisions and conflicts with existing air traffic and obs...
author: Gioacchino Sterlicchio (DMMM, Polytechnic University of Bari, Bari, Italy), Angelo Oddi (ISTC-CNR, Rome, Italy), Riccardo Rasconi (ISTC-CNR, Rome, Italy), Francesca Alessandra Lisi (DIB,CILA, University of Bari Aldo Moro, Bari, Italy)
